🗓️ Key Dates — Peak Planning
⚡
Prime Week — Typically July
Start hiring 6–8 weeks before. Vans get taken fast — coordinate with station early.
🎄
Peak Season — Nov 1 – Jan 15
Begin peak hiring by September. Lock in extra vans before other DSPs grab them.
💡
Competitive Tip
Other DSPs at your station will compete for the same vans and drivers. Get your requests in first — every time.
Paste your capacity report on the left and click Parse to see it here.
